final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: classical-oil-painting-portrait
Asset type: museum-quality portrait painting, vertical canvas
Primary request: Rembrandt-style chiaroscuro portrait of a contemporary East Asian professional woman in her mid-30s, holding a thick heavy book
Scene/backdrop: deep dark brown background, near-featureless, all attention drawn to the subject's face
Subject: East Asian woman, approximately 35 years old, wearing a dark navy/charcoal business suit, intelligent and resolute expression, one hand holding a thick heavy book with visible knuckle and skin texture detail
Style/medium: Dutch Golden Age oil painting, Rembrandt technique, thick impasto brushwork, visible oil paint texture and layered glazing
Composition/framing: classic portrait framing, bust-to-waist, slight three-quarter angle, face as focal point
Lighting/mood: Rembrandt lighting — warm key light illuminating one side of the face with a distinct triangular highlight on the cheek, opposite side softly receding into shadow; solemn, dignified, introspective mood
Color palette: burnt umber, raw sienna, deep crimson, dark brown; bright warm white reserved only for the facial highlight zone; no cool tones
Materials/textures: thick impasto oil paint strokes, visible bristle marks, rich glazed shadows, fine skin texture on face and hands, fabric weave on suit
Constraints: maintain classical Rembrandt triangle highlight on face; keep background nearly detail-free; preserve fine hand and knuckle rendering; no modern photographic look
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, smooth digital illustration, bright or colorful background, flat lighting, contemporary art style
